name: holography
description: Photographic technique that produces multidimensional images where all visual information from the object, its environment, and the space in which it is located is recorded by coherent light such as a laser beam. The holographic image, hologram, appears in an unrecognisable pattern until illumination by a coherent light organises it into a 3D representation of the original object. Holography can record light intensity but also the degree to which the wave fronts, components of the reflected light, are matched to each other.
